title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. It supports multiple output modes including prototypes, slide decks, templates, and custom designs, producing downloadable code and responsive UI components automatically.
